mapper.select: SELECT HOMEPAGE_ID, DONATE_IDX, NAME, PHONE, CELL_PHONE, DONATE_BOOK, DONATE_COUNT, DONATE_METHOD, DONATE_YN, TO_CHAR(ADD_DATE, 'yyyy-mm') AS ADD_DATE, DONATE_YEAR, DONATE_MONTH, PROCESS_STATUS FROM DONATE_BOOK WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} ORDER BY DONATE_IDX ASC

SELECT HOMEPAGE_ID, DONATE_IDX, NAME, PHONE, CELL_PHONE, DONATE_BOOK, DONATE_COUNT, DONATE_METHOD, DONATE_YN, TO_CHAR(ADD_DATE, 'yyyy-mm') AS ADD_DATE, DONATE_YEAR, DONATE_MONTH, DONATE_DAY, PROCESS_STATUS FROM DONATE_BOOK WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND DONATE_IDX = #{donate_idx}
mapper.update: UPDATE DONATE_BOOK SET NAME = #{name}, PHONE = #{phone}, CELL_PHONE = #{cell_phone}, DONATE_BOOK = #{donate_book}, DONATE_COUNT = #{donate_count}, DONATE_METHOD = #{donate_method}, DONATE_YN = #{donate_yn}, DONATE_YEAR = #{donate_year}, DONATE_MONTH = #{donate_month}, DONATE_DAY = #{donate_day}, PROCESS_STATUS = #{process_status} WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND DONATE_IDX = #{donate_idx}
